trivia: The shortened member of the original A320 ceo family trades seats for legs: with the same wing and fuel as its bigger siblings, the A319 flies farther, which made it a favorite for long thin routes and high-altitude airports.
Numbers are slowly declining as neos replace ceos, so every A319 in the Dex ages a little better each year.
funFacts: The basis of the ACJ319 corporate jet.
Certified for the steep approach into London City in some configurations.
